task.title: Update relay to use published relaycast Rust reclaim fix

events.content: Use relaycast 1.0.1 register_or_get_agent for strict-name reclaim: Use relaycast 1.0.1 register_or_get_agent for strict-name reclaim

raw.question: Use relaycast 1.0.1 register_or_get_agent for strict-name reclaim
raw.chosen: Use relaycast 1.0.1 register_or_get_agent for strict-name reclaim
raw.reasoning: The Rust SDK now tolerates the public agent payload and owns the get-agent plus rotate-token flow, so relay no longer needs direct HttpClient JSON parsing or urlencoding.

retrospective.summary: Bumped relay to relaycast 1.0.1 and routed strict-name agent startup through the SDK-owned register_or_get_agent reclaim path, removing the relay-local raw JSON/urlencoding workaround.
